rfqFeatureEnabled.BuildRight_Carlos: YES — /account/quotes accessible, 'Add cart items to quote' button on cart sidebar, 'Request Quote' button on quotes list page, footer 'Quote requests' link visible, Purchasing sidebar 'Quote requests' nav item visible
rfqFeatureEnabled.TechFlow_Emily: YES — same feature set. Emily already has pre-existing quote RFQ260320-00001 from 3/20/2026 (Processing status, $0.00 total)

featureDiscovery.negotiationFeature: NOT OBSERVED — no 'Request Revision' / 'Counter-offer' / 'Propose Changes' controls visible on any quote detail page in current state (Processing). Cannot verify availability until admin responds with 'Quote Received' state quote.
featureDiscovery.fileAttachmentFeature: YES — RFQ edit form has Files section with drag-and-drop + Browse button. Accepted formats: CSV, DOCX, JPG, PDF, PNG, TXT, XLSX. Max 10MB per file, max 5 files.
featureDiscovery.substitutionFeature: NOT OBSERVED — no 'Substitution' badge, dual-product line items, or accept/reject-per-line controls visible on any quote.
featureDiscovery.addItemsDuringQuoteFeature: NO / NOT FOUND — when 'Request Quote' is clicked on list page, an empty quote is created (RFQ260422-00003) with 'Quote request has no items' warning banner, Submit button disabled, but NO 'Add product' / 'Add item' / 'Browse products' controls inside the Products section to populate the empty quote. This is a partial feature gap / bug candidate: empty draft quotes cannot be populated from within the quote edit UI.
featureDiscovery.statusHistoryTimelineFeature: NOT OBSERVED — detail page shows only current Status in Quote data panel, no status transition history / timeline / audit log.
featureDiscovery.quoteFilterByStatusFeature: PARTIAL — Status column header is clickable (sorts by status), but there is NO dropdown/tabs/checkbox filter to filter by a single status. Only sort.
featureDiscovery.quoteSearchFeature: YES — 'Search by number or status' textbox with search button. Confirmed working: exact quote ID returns the matching quote; invalid ID returns 'There are no results found' empty state with 'Reset search' button.

listColumnsAndSorting.defaultSort: Date ascending on load; visible arrow is ↑ but list shows newer dates above older — either (a) default is Date descending with ↑ indicator showing next-click direction, or (b) minor UI/icon inconsistency. Not a blocking bug.
listColumnsAndSorting.rowClickBehavior: Clicking a row opens quote detail in NEW TAB (target=_blank) instead of same-tab navigation. UX choice worth noting for test authors.

quoteFormSections: Products (read-only qty/price rows with remove buttons)
featureDiscovery.crossOrgIsolation: CONFIRMED — Emily (TechFlow) attempting to load Carlos (BuildRight)'s quote URL /account/quotes/29a6294b-f37a-458c-acfc-726673f7765d returned 403 Access denied. BL-B2B-005 invariant upheld.
featureDiscovery.xssEscaping: CONFIRMED — historic XSS payload in default shipping address ( ) rendered as literal plain text on Quote detail 'Shipping address' block. No script executed; no alert dialog. BL-AUTH-001 / stored-XSS defense upheld.

BuildRight_Carlos.lineItemDetails: SHOT gift (qty 1 @ $0.00), Erdinger Alkoholfrei German Wheat Beer (qty 24 @ $1,234.00 → $25,200.00 with discount), XIAOMI MIJIA Portable Juicer (qty 1 @ $100.00 → $99.99 with discount)

BuildRight_Carlos.shippingAddress: 123 XSS Rerun St, NY-XSS, New York, 10001, United States of America (XSS payload historic — stored as literal)
BuildRight_Carlos.candidateFor: {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} after admin responds; {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} after admin responds and buyer accepts

BuildRight_Carlos.notes: Accidentally created as empty draft by clicking 'Request Quote' on list page (feature discovery test). Cannot be populated from within the quote UI and cannot be submitted (Submit button disabled). Leaving as-is for next test run; candidate for Draft-state negative test cases.

TechFlow_Emily.lineItemDetails: 2024 Gaming Laptop Ninkear (qty 1 @ $99.99), X2S Kids Camera OPEN-SMART (qty 3 @ $99.99 → $299.97), Vintage Colorado Hoodie Malachite Size 55 (qty 1 @ $54.00), Kingston KC3000 SSD 512Gb (qty 1 @ $80.27)
TechFlow_Emily.comment: REG-2026-04-20-1000 Suite-015 baseline RFQ for TechFlow — tech inventory request. Admin please respond with bulk discount pricing.
TechFlow_Emily.shippingAddress: 456 Oak Avenue, Apt 4B, 10001, New York, New York, United States of America
TechFlow_Emily.candidateFor: {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} for TechFlow after admin responds; {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} after acceptance

preExisting.notes: Pre-existing seed from earlier run; persistent in Emily's account; total $0.00 suggests either empty or admin has not yet quoted pricing.

testCases.title: Create RFQ from Cart
testCases.notes: Executed twice (once per user). Carlos/BuildRight: cart had 2+ items (Erdinger qty 24 + XIAOMI qty 1 + SHOT gift), clicked 'Add cart items to quote' in cart sidebar — immediately navigated to /account/quotes/{uuid}/edit with all 3 cart items pre-populated at cart quantities. Comment field was fillable. Submitted → redirect to /account/quotes list. New quote RFQ260422-00002 appeared with Processing status and computed total. Same flow verified for Emily/TechFlow creating RFQ260422-00004. All GraphQL mutations returned HTTP 200. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: View Quote in Account
testCases.notes: Verified on Carlos's list page: RFQ260422-00002 visible with Quote number, submission date (4/22/2026), Status badge 'Processing', Total $30,359.99. Emily's list similarly shows RFQ260422-00004 (Processing, $821.08) and RFQ260320-00001 (Processing, $0.00). Sidebar 'Quote requests' link highlighted when active.

testCases.title: Quote Detail Page
testCases.notes: Clicked row in quote list for RFQ260422-00002 — opened in NEW TAB (UX note: target=_blank on row). Detail page heading 'Quote request #RFQ260422-00002'. All 3 line items listed with product names, requested quantities (disabled/read-only after submission), unit prices and totals. Comment text visible: 'REG-2026-04-20-1000 Suite-015 baseline RFQ — please respond with negotiated pricing...'. Quote Summary sidebar: Subtotal $29,716.00, Discount $4,416.01, Tax $5,060.00, Total $30,359.99. Quote Data panel: Created 4/22/2026, Status Processing. Shipping address rendered safely (historic XSS payload displayed as literal text).

testCases.title: Admin Response Notification
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} not available — all 3 baseline quotes created in this run (00002, 00004 fresh; 00001 pre-existing) are still in Processing status. Admin has not responded to any with pricing. Candidate quotes for re-test once admin responds: RFQ260422-00002 (Carlos) or RFQ260422-00004 (Emily).

testCases.title: View Updated Quote Pricing
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} — no quote in Quote Received state this run. Admin-proposed per-line pricing cannot be verified until admin responds.

testCases.title: Accept Quote
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} — Accept Quote button not visible on any Processing-state quote (confirmed via DOM inspection of RFQ260422-00002 detail page). Acceptance pathway requires admin to respond first.

testCases.title: Convert Quote to Order
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} — no accepted quote available. Depends on QUOTE-006 (Accept Quote) which requires admin response first.

testCases.title: Reject Quote
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} — Reject Quote button requires Quote Received state. Not available on any Processing-state quote.

testCases.title: Quote Negotiation
testCases.notes: COND-WRAP feature gate: negotiation/revision feature not observed in current storefront build. No 'Request Revision' / 'Counter-offer' / 'Propose Changes' controls visible in any quote state encountered (Processing, Draft). Requires both {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} seed AND negotiation feature to be enabled in store config. Deferred until feature availability confirmed.

testCases.title: Quote with Substitution
testCases.notes: COND-WRAP feature gate: substitution feature not observed. No 'Substitution' badge, dual-product line items, or per-line accept/reject controls visible. Requires {{QUOTE_WITH_SUBSTITUTION}} seed AND substitution feature enabled in admin.

testCases.title: Quote Expiry
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{EXPIRED_QUOTE}} — no quote with past expiry date exists. Admin must set expiry date on an existing quote and wait for it to pass, or create a quote with historic expiry date via admin.

testCases.title: Quote History Filter
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: quotes in all 4 statuses (Processing, Accepted, Rejected, Expired). Carlos has Processing + Draft; Emily has Processing only. PLUS: NO dedicated status filter dropdown/tabs observed — only Status-column sort is available. Even if seeds existed, test-case expectation of filter UI may not match product behavior. Deferred until (a) seeds available AND (b) test case reviewed for storefront actual filter capability.

testCases.title: Quote with Attachments
testCases.notes: Feature confirmed present (Files section on RFQ edit form — CSV/DOCX/JPG/PDF/PNG/TXT/XLSX, max 10MB, max 5 files — visible on both RFQ260422-00002 and 00004 edit pages) but not executed this run to avoid test-data pollution. Deferred to dedicated attachment-feature test run where upload → persist → admin download can all be verified. Will execute in follow-up run.

testCases.title: Multiple Active Quotes
testCases.notes: Verified on both Carlos's and Emily's list pages. Table structure confirmed: caption 'requested quotes', 4 columns (Quote number, Date, Status, Total). Each row shows all 4 fields. Status badges are color-coded with icons (Draft green outline w/ pencil, Processing blue outline w/ clock). Column headers Quote number, Date, Status are sortable (buttons); Total is not. Carlos: 2 quotes with different statuses (Draft, Processing). Emily: 2 Processing quotes from different dates. Only 2 quotes per user this run, so pagination not triggered.

testCases.title: RFQ from Saved List
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: saved list with 2+ products owned by Carlos or Emily. /account/lists not navigated this run. Feature-gated (COND-WRAP) on 'RFQ from list feature enabled' — presence of 'Request Quote' button on list detail page unconfirmed until seed list is available.

testCases.title: RFQ Form - Buyer Modifies Item Quantities Before Submission
testCases.notes: Partially verified: on RFQ edit form for RFQ260422-00002, Quantity fields for Erdinger (24) and XIAOMI (1) had visible +/- steppers (Decrease disabled for XIAOMI qty 1 as expected). The form pre-populated cart quantities. Did NOT modify qty in this run (to preserve seed data integrity for downstream admin-response testing) but the control structure (editable qty steppers with Increase/Decrease buttons, live total recalc via 'Save changes') was confirmed present. Full qty-change-then-verify cycle deferred to dedicated QUOTE-016 run.

testCases.title: Quote Search by Quote ID
testCases.notes: Executed on Carlos's list (2 quotes). Typed 'RFQ260422-00002' in search textbox + Enter → list filtered to single matching row. Typed 'RFQ999999-99999' (nonexistent) + Enter → empty state with illustration, 'There are no results found', and 'Reset search' button. Clicked Reset search → full 2-quote list restored. Search textbox accepts free text; placeholder is 'Search by number or status'.

testCases.title: Quote Negotiation - Buyer Counter-Offer with Different Price
testCases.notes: COND-WRAP feature gate: counter-offer feature not observed in any current quote (see QUOTE-009 note). Also requires {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} seed.

testCases.title: Quote Negotiation - Multi-Round Back and Forth
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{QUOTE_MULTI_ROUND}} — quote with 2+ completed negotiation rounds (admin-offer → buyer-counter → admin-re-offer). Also depends on negotiation feature being enabled. Deferred.

testCases.title: Quote Negotiation - Add Items During Active Quote
testCases.notes: COND-WRAP feature gate: add-items-to-quote feature appears ABSENT. Confirmed empirically on RFQ260422-00003 (Draft state, empty quote) — the Products section shows 'Quote request has no items' warning but provides NO UI controls (no 'Add product', 'Add item', 'Browse products', search input, or link) to populate an empty quote. This creates an effective dead-end for the list-page 'Request Quote' button when no cart exists. Bug candidate — see notes in 'additionalObservations' below.

testCases.title: Quote Negotiation - Item Quantity Change During Quote
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} in editable state. On viewed-detail page of RFQ260422-00002 (Processing), quantity fields are DISABLED (read-only) — editable quantity controls only exist on the /edit variant of the URL before submission (covered by QUOTE-016). Post-submission editability requires admin to respond and reopen editability; feature availability unconfirmed.

testCases.title: Quote Status - Expired Quote Cannot Be Accepted
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{EXPIRED_QUOTE}} — see QUOTE-011 note. Cannot verify expired-state UI constraints without an expired quote seed.

testCases.title: Quote Status - Expiry Date and Status Badge Display
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: at least {{EXPIRED_QUOTE}} + one future-expiry quote + one no-expiry quote. None exist in current dataset — Processing/Draft quotes in this run do not show expiry date field on detail page (Quote data panel has Created date + Status only).

testCases.title: Quote Status - Status Transitions Visible in History
testCases.notes: COND-WRAP feature gate AND seed required. No status history / timeline section observed on any quote detail page visited this run (RFQ260422-00002 detail has only current status in Quote data panel, no history log). Also requires {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} or {{QUOTE_REJECTED}} with 2+ status transitions recorded. Deferred.

testCases.title: Quote Status - Notification on Status Change
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} with admin just having changed status. Emily's Notifications badge shows '2' (visible in nav) — but these are not confirmed to be quote-related. Requires timed admin action + buyer session to verify notification pathway.

testCases.title: Quote to Order - Convert When Item Out of Stock
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE_OOS}} — accepted quote with item made OOS after acceptance. Requires admin inventory manipulation and accepted-quote seed.

testCases.title: Quote to Order - Convert After Admin Price Change
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} with admin-proposed prices different from catalog. No such quote exists this run.

testCases.title: Quote to Order - Partial Conversion Not Supported
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} with 3+ line items. No such quote exists this run.

testCases.title: Quote to Order - PO Number Preserved from RFQ
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE_WITH_PO}} — accepted quote submitted with PO number reference. Also: the observed RFQ edit form did NOT expose a PO number field during submission (Comment, Files, Products, Shipping/Billing addresses only). PO number preservation flow may not be implemented on the storefront RFQ path, or may require a different feature gate. Two-layer blocker.

testCases.title: Quote to Order - Conversion Updates Quote Status to Ordered
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}}. Depends on QUOTE-007 chain.

additionalObservations: FEATURE GAP / BUG CANDIDATE: Empty quotes created via list-page 'Request Quote' button cannot be populated — no Add/Browse/Search-product control exists in the Products section of an empty-draft quote's edit page. The Submit button correctly disables (validation working), but there is no forward path except returning to cart. Either (a) the list-page 'Request Quote' button should be removed when cart is empty, or (b) an 'Add products' mechanism should be added to the empty quote edit form. RFQ260422-00003 is a live artifact of this dead-end state. — SEVERITY: Medium, AFFECTS: RFQ from list, QUOTE-020 test coverage.

UX OBSERVATION: Clicking a quote row in the quotes list opens the detail in a NEW TAB (target=_blank). This contradicts common expectation of same-tab navigation for account-area rows. Worth a product decision review.

UX OBSERVATION: Date column default-sort arrow is ↑ but rows show newer dates above older. Either (a) arrow semantics are inverted, (b) sort is descending but arrow indicates click-direction for next toggle, or (c) documentation/styling inconsistency. Non-blocking.
BL-B2B-005 CROSS-ORG ISOLATION CONFIRMED: Emily accessing Carlos's quote UUID returned 403 Access denied. Strong isolation confirmed at UI AND backend authorization level.
STORED-XSS DEFENSE CONFIRMED: Legacy XSS payload in address field rendered as literal plain text on quote detail (BL-AUTH-001, ECL-1.1). Good defense-in-depth posture.

VISUAL INCONSISTENCY: Cart view shows Discount as '-$5,416.00' (negative sign, red formatting) but Quote detail shows Discount as '$4,416.01' (positive) with different magnitude. Values differ ($5,416 vs $4,416) — suggests either (a) promotion/discount is re-evaluated at quote-creation time (which is expected behavior per BL-PRICE-001 cart-level promo rules), or (b) display-only discrepancy. Not classifiable as a bug without deeper cross-reference to BL-QUOTE-002. Noted for follow-up.

COMMENT FIELD: 1000-char limit, NOT marked required on first RFQ (filled but no red asterisk visible). On empty-quote RFQ260422-00003 however the 'Do you have a general remark...' label shows a red asterisk — required status may be conditional on quote emptiness or a different feature-flag. Minor inconsistency.
errors: SEED POOL: 14 of 30 cases are SEED-blocked because the agent pool lacks any quotes in {QUOTE_RECEIVED, ACCEPTED, REJECTED, EXPIRED} states. Admin-side seeding of quote lifecycle is the primary unblock. Post-response seeds expected from admin handling of RFQ260422-00002 and RFQ260422-00004.

FEATURE GATE: 5 of 30 cases (009, 010, 018, 020, 024) correctly self-skipped on COND-WRAP feature gates because negotiation/substitution/add-items/status-history features were not observed in the current storefront build.

CONSOLE: 1 console 404 for a background script fetch ('A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script'). Not correlated to any quote functional behavior — appears on every page across test suite and is likely SW or analytics loader. Non-blocking.

UNSUBMITTED DRAFT: RFQ260422-00003 (Carlos) left as empty Draft because the edit page has no product-adding control. Safe for environment (Submit disabled prevents pollution of Processing pool) but is a residual test artifact worth cleanup via admin panel.
